les with marks of trident, fish,
arrow etc., honey-coloured and round eyes, be fond of sporting in water, will be delighted in
sexually uniting with females, will weigh 1600 tulas and be 96 inch tall. He will lord over Sura
Sena, Gandharva and places between the Ganges and Yamuna. His end will come later on
in a forest. His longevity will be hundred years.
14-15. BHADRA YOGA.
One born with the Bhadra Yoga will have a face, akin to that of a tiger, will imitate the elephant in
gait, will have broad chest, long and strong hands and square body, will be sensuous, will
have soft hair over cheeks, be learned, will possess hands and legs akin to lotus, be
endowed with prowess and will be conversant with Yoga. His palms and soles will contain
symbols of conch, sword, elephant, arrow, wheel, lotus, plough etc. His body will emanate
smell akin to earth settled with fresh drizzles (particularly first of the season), sandal paste
and elephants ichor.
16-18. BHADRA YOGA (continued).
